title: Citation Generator
description: Generate properly formatted citations in APA, MLA, or Chicago style from source details
viralHook: Never lose points on citations again -- APA, MLA, and Chicago in one click

props.title: Citation Generator
props.description: Enter source details and select a citation format. The tool will generate a properly formatted citation you can copy directly into your paper.

fields.label: Title of Work
fields.placeholder: e.g. The Art of Scientific Writing

fields.label: Journal / Website / Container Title (if applicable)
fields.placeholder: e.g. Nature, The New York Times

computedFields.apa_output: author_last + ', ' + author_first.charAt(0) + '.' + (author2_last ? ' & ' + author2_last + ', ' + author2_first.charAt(0) + '.' : '') + ' (' + year + '). ' + (source_type === 'book' ? title + (edition ? ' (' + edition + ' ed.)' : '') + '. ' + (publisher || '') + '.' : (source_type === 'journal' ? title + '. ' + (container_title ? container_title + ', ' : '') + (volume || '') + (issue ? '(' + issue + ')' : '') + (pages ? ', ' + pages : '') + '.' : title + '. ' + (container_title || '') + '.')) + (doi ? ' https://doi.org/' + doi : (url ? ' ' + url : ''))
computedFields.mla_output: author_last + ', ' + author_first + (author2_last ? ', and ' + author2_first + ' ' + author2_last : '') + '. ' + (source_type === 'book' ? '"' + title + '."' : '"' + title + '."') + (container_title ? ' ' + container_title + ',' : '') + (publisher ? ' ' + publisher + ',' : '') + ' ' + year + (volume ? ', vol. ' + volume : '') + (issue ? ', no. ' + issue : '') + (pages ? ', pp. ' + pages : '') + '.' + (url ? ' ' + url + '.' : '') + (access_date ? ' Accessed ' + access_date + '.' : '')
computedFields.chicago_output: author_last + ', ' + author_first + (author2_last ? ', and ' + author2_first + ' ' + author2_last : '') + '. ' + (source_type === 'book' ? title + '.' : '"' + title + '."') + (container_title ? ' ' + container_title : '') + (volume ? ' ' + volume : '') + (issue ? ', no. ' + issue : '') + (pages ? ' (' + year + '): ' + pages : '') + '. ' + (publisher ? publisher + ', ' : '') + year + '.' + (doi ? ' https://doi.org/' + doi : (url ? ' ' + url + '.' : ''))
